name: Enchilada Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan.
3. Mix Monterey Jack cheese, cheddar cheese, onion, sour cream, parsley, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Set aside.
4. Combine tomato sauce, water, green pepper, chili powder, oregano, cumin, and garlic in a pot. Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally.
5. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie pan.
7. Dip each tortilla into the sauce to coat both sides. Spoon about 1/4 cup of cheese mixture onto each tortilla.
8. Arrange the tortillas in a 13 x 7 inch baking dish.
9. Pour remaining sauce over enchiladas.
10. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup cheddar cheese.
11. Bake uncovered for about 20 minutes, or until hot and bubbling.
